evals.prompt: 帮我搜索一下'新华社'的公众号，告诉我它的fakeid
evals.expected_output: 返回新华社的公众号信息表格，包含 fakeid

assertions.text: Output contains a fakeid value (base64-like string)
Output includes structured format (table or labeled field)

evals.prompt: 抓取这篇微信公众号文章的内容：https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/cqReGFmQPdsaYqyVFuJlLg
evals.expected_output: 返回文章的纯文本内容，包含标题

assertions.text: Output contains article title as heading
Output contains substantial text (>100 chars of content)
Output is not a JSON error object

evals.prompt: 帮我看看新华社公众号最近发了什么文章，列出最新5篇
evals.expected_output: 先搜索新华社获取fakeid，然后列出最新5篇文章的标题和日期

assertions.text: Output lists multiple articles (at least 3 titles)
Output does NOT contain raw Unix timestamps (10+ consecutive digits)
